title: Compact position cards — remove visual bloat
objective: Reduce each position card to essential info only. Cards currently show 6 stat boxes, a probability track bar, a sparkline chart, and a reasons row — most is redundant or low-value and makes every card take up half the screen.
inputs: Current pos-stats div contains 6 stat boxes: Entry, Current, Live PnL, TP, SL, Confidence
Live PnL is shown TWICE: once in pos-badge-col as pnl-large, and again as a stat box
probTrack = buildProbTrack(r) adds a probability bar to every card
sparkline = buildSparkline(r.market_slug) adds a mini chart to every card
reasons row adds reason tags to every card
deliverables: Remove probTrack from buildUnifiedPositionCards() — delete the variable and its use in the template
Remove sparkline from buildUnifiedPositionCards() — delete the variable and its use in the template
Remove the reasons row from buildUnifiedPositionCards() — delete the reasons.length conditional block
Remove the duplicate 'Live PnL' stat box from pos-stats (the stat-box with stat-label 'Live PnL') — keep pnl-large in pos-badge-col
Reduce pos-stats to 3 stat boxes: Entry, Current, Confidence (remove TP and SL stat boxes — these will be shown server-side in a later task)
Keep: game context pill, pos-top row with team/badges/pnl-large, conf-wrap bar
acceptance_criteria: No sparkline SVG rendered in any position card
No probability track bar rendered in any position card
No reasons tags row rendered in any position card
PnL appears exactly once per card (in pos-badge-col)
pos-stats shows exactly 3 boxes: Entry, Current, Confidence
Cards are visually much shorter — roughly half the previous height
No unrelated JS or CSS changed
verification: Open http://localhost:5000 in browser and confirm cards are compact
